breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome Author Silent 19 Days: Longest Manual-Commit Gap Since Review Launched
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome author has not manually committed to his site in 18.98 days (approaching 19d threshold at 12:02 UTC 2026-05-06). His AI-review pipeline continues auto-committing — suggesting automated systems are running but no human editorial intervention. This is the longest sustained manual-commit drought since our review began, occurring concurrently with HOLD #15 (5th consecutive auto-commit without registry update).
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Sustained inactivity from the dome author amid an active review creates a notable pattern — particularly 97 days before the August 2026 eclipse that many of his predictions test against.
